allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add card input textarea badge separator -y)
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); console.log\('Twitter' in l, 'X' in l\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('linked'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('github'\)\); console.log\(names\)")

Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('link'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('git'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('globe'\)\); console.log\(names.join\(', '\)\)")
